mood: quiet media bloom under fluorescent archival pressure
lighting: flat overhead fluorescent wash with one screen-lit spill, shallow aperture shadows, and a few cyan-blue compression glints
object_inventory: low horizontal slab echoes translated into soft media bands
thin archive-strip cuts along two edges
tiny paper-tag scars without readable text
branching filament scratches crossing one seam
negative_constraints: no legible words, numbers, logos, filenames, or interface labels inside the image
no dashboard, desk, cabinet, shelf, gallery wall, archive wall, or card grid
no literal showroom, mattress, balloon, retail sign, fashion show, greenhouse, garden index, or software UI
preserve roughly two-thirds uninterrupted negative field
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
